since_last: 49% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.36%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +0.84% · Gold +0.89% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 49% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.36%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.36%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -4.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -21.43%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +4.46%, LRCX +4.16%, TER +4.07%, KLAC +4.00%, MRVL +3.52%. Laggards: IBM -21.43%, WDAY -8.54%, NOW -6.97%, INTU -5.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.05% at $139.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
